title: [Fasthr's Lance, Crown]
description: Raised high above the green hillock that Fasthr's Lance occupies, the crenellated tower rooftop facilitates a panoramic view of Solhaven and Cairnfang Bay.  Incised shield patterns mark the top of each crenellation.  Striking yet higher, a dark ora lance hoisting a black ensign stitched with a snow-white shield proclaims the tower's allegiance.
